name: Household overview enrichment and actionable list summaries
description: Upgrade the household overview/list experience from a thin navigation surface into a useful operational summary for users who belong to one or more households. This follow-up should replace placeholder information with real household signals, surface the minimum set of high-value summaries and quick actions, and better connect the household list to the richer detail flows that already exist. The aim is to reduce the current mismatch where household detail is reasonably mature but the overview layer still feels unfinished and under-informative.
evidence: Active ExecPlan: docs/exec-plans/plans/2026-05-07-feat-042-household-overview-enrichment.md; Implemented enriched `/households` overview with extracted `HouseholdCreateDialog` and `HouseholdSummaryCard`, truthful member count / budget presence / spend activity signals, localized role and visibility labels, skeleton loading, responsive grid cards, and focused regressions in apps/web/src/views/app/households-page.test.tsx plus apps/web/src/components/household/household-create-dialog.test.tsx; Verification: pnpm --filter web exec vitest run src/views/app/households-page.test.tsx src/components/household/household-create-dialog.test.tsx src/views/app/household-detail-page.test.tsx src/components/household/household-settings-card.test.tsx; pnpm --filter web typecheck; pnpm --filter web lint (passes with one pre-existing warning in apps/web/src/components/expense/category-picker.tsx)
